q: What subjects did you like most when you were at school?
examiner_note:
Câu hỏi này về quá khứ (Kể lại). 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Sử dụng thì quá khứ đơn (Past Simple). Bạn có thể nói về các môn tự nhiên (Maths, Physics) hoặc xã hội (History, Literature, Geography). Giải thích lý do tại sao thích (do giáo viên dạy hay, do môn học thú vị, hay do bạn có năng khiếu). 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cụm từ như 'I was particularly fond of', 'I had a natural aptitude for', 'What really fascinated me was...', 'It captured my imagination'.

band7.text: When I was at school, I liked History and Geography the most. I found them very interesting because they helped me learn about different countries and what happened in the past. My History teacher was also very good at telling stories, which made the lessons fun.
band7.note: Sử dụng thì quá khứ chính xác. Trình bày lý do đơn giản và rõ ràng. Từ vựng ổn ('Geograhy', 'History').

band8.text: I was particularly fond of Mathematics and Physics. I've always had a logical mind, so solving complex equations and understanding the laws of the universe was extremely satisfying for me. I also had a natural aptitude for numbers from a very young age.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao ('fond of', 'logical mind', 'complex equations', 'laws of the universe', 'aptitude').

band9.text: What really fascinated me throughout my school years was English Literature. I was completely captivated by the way authors could use language to create vivid worlds and intricate characters. It really captured my imagination and sparked a lifelong passion for reading and writing.
band9.note: Diễn đạt cực kỳ lôi cuốn ('fascinated me', 'completely captivated', 'vivid worlds', 'intricate characters', 'captured my imagination', 'sparked a passion'). Cấu trúc câu rất linh hoạt và tự nhiên.

v.example: I was particularly fond of my grandmother's cooking.
She has a natural aptitude for learning new languages.
Space travel has always fascinated me since I was a child.
The story of the lost city captured the imagination of the whole world.
I have very vivid memories of my first day at school.
The watch has an extremely intricate mechanism.
A simple science experiment sparked his passion for chemistry.
Engineering requires a very logical mind and attention to detail.
We spent the whole afternoon trying to solve these complex equations.
Finishing a marathon is an incredibly satisfying achievement.
The audience was completely captivated by the dancer's performance.
It rained heavily throughout the entire football match.
I love my job because it provides constant intellectual stimulation.
His lifelong passion for music began when he was just five years old.
Children have a natural curiosity about the world around them.
History is her favorite academic subject.
Math and English are core subjects in most school curriculums.
I chose drama as my elective this semester.
The course is quite theoretical and lacks practical application.
I prefer subjects that have a more practical focus.
The school trip to Paris was a very memorable experience.
I was lucky to have an inspiring teacher who encouraged me to pursue my dreams.
The exam was very challenging, but I think I did well.
Helping others is a very rewarding experience.
Art class is a great place to express your creative side.
Solving puzzles helps develop analytical skills.
He is very disciplined about his study routine.

v.meaning: sự xuất sắc trong học tập
v.example: The school celebrates academic excellence at the end-of-year ceremony.
Lack of motivation is one of the main reasons students fail.
It took a lot of perseverance but I finally finished the project.
Computer literacy is an essential skill in the modern world.
Good numeracy skills are necessary for many everyday tasks.
She wants to pursue a scientific career in medicine.
The city has many beautiful historical buildings.
The geographical location of the island is very unique.
He comes from a very artistic family.
She has a lot of musical talent and plays three instruments.
Physical education is an important part of the school day.
The humanities department offers courses in history, literature, and philosophy.

v.meaning: các môn khoa học xã hội
v.example: Sociology and psychology are popular social sciences subjects.

v.meaning: các môn khoa học chính xác
v.example: Maths and physics are considered exact sciences.
The school is revising its curriculum to include more practical skills.
You should check the syllabus for the required reading list.
I need to finish this assignment by Friday.
The guest speaker gave a very interesting lecture on climate change.
We had a very stimulating seminar on ancient history today.
I found the tutorial very helpful for understanding the difficult concepts.
Our history teacher is incredibly knowledgeable and passionate.
The school aims to provide a well-rounded education for all its students.
School is a time for significant intellectual growth and discovery.
